summary: Dashboard renders correctly in error state with proper fallback behavior. Brand palette divergence from public surfaces creates visual discontinuity, but core functionality and error handling work as specified.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses generic dark sidebar (#1f1b18 background) and neutral UI palette instead of the diner brand palette (teal #9fd8d2, cream #fff8ea) used on public surfaces, creating brand discontinuity after login
Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces - sidebar is dark neutral, main content area is generic white/cream rather than branded teal or cream variants

actions: Apply consistent brand palette between public marketing surfaces and authenticated dashboard
Replace generic dark sidebar with diner palette treatment
Ensure main dashboard canvas uses branded cream (#fff8ea) or teal (#9fd8d2) variants instead of neutral backgrounds
